words.def: the lower part of the female reproductive tract; a moist canal in female mammals extending from the labia minora to the uterus
words.zh: n. 陰道, 鞘, 葉鞘
adv. 再一次, 又, 到原處
n. 增益, 獲得, 利潤, 收穫, 增加

words.def: mother of the ancient Irish gods; sometimes identified with Danu
words.zh: n. 言論集, 語錄, 軼事

words.def: any creative group active in the innovation and application of new concepts and techniques in a given field (especially in the arts)
words.zh: n. 貨車, 篷車, 先鋒, 前驅, 前衛
